---
title: "Data folder — parquet preview"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```

Load each `.parquet` file under `data/` and show the first five rows.

```{r libraries}
library(tidyverse)
library(arrow)
library(fs)
```

```{r preview-parquet-files}
data_dir <- path("data")

parquet_paths <- dir_ls(data_dir, glob = "*.parquet") |> sort()

walk(parquet_paths, function(path) {
  cat("\n\n## ", path_file(path), "\n\n", sep = "")
  read_parquet(path) |>
    as_tibble() |>
    head(5) |>
    print()
})
```
